calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-06-2011 Off Calendar

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-04-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. JOANNE C. CHAN OF ALVARADO SMITH, TEL. NO. 624-8665 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANTS;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANTS CALIFORNIA RECONVEYANCE COMPANY, DEUTSCHE BANK NATIONAL TRUST COMPANY, AS TRUSTEE FOR LONG BEACH MORTGAGE LOAN TRUST 2006-WL2 AND J P MORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is sustained without leave to amend. No opposition filed. Leave to amend not granted because it was not requested and defendants' previous demurrer had been sustained. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR # 7077 = (302/HEK)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-26-2011 Continued To Oct-21-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-24-2011 Continued To Sep-09-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-03-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
DEFENDANTS CALIFORNIA RECONVEYANCE COMPANY, DEUTSCHE BANK NATIONAL TRUST COMPANY, as trustee for Long Beach Mortgage Loan Trust 2006-WL2, and JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A., as acquirer of certain assets and liabilities of Washington Mutual Bank, F.A. from the FDIC as Receiver and as successor by merger to CHASE HOME FINANCE, LLC, DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT.

APPEARANCES: Daska P. Babcock, Esq. of AlvaradoSmith 624-8665 for defts & moving parties (appearing via CourtCall); no other appearances.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling - SUSTAIN WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. NO OPPOSITION FILED. In addition, the Court indicated that plaintiff has 10 days to file the amended complaint. Defendant to submit a proposed form of order. (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797
